violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. At time of inspection, sanitizer was not installed and will be installed within the week. PIC got bleach at time of inspection. Proof of service to be sent to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
